faqs.question: What are your clinic hours?
faqs.answer: Our clinic hours are Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM, and Saturday from 10 AM to 3 PM. We are closed on Sundays.

faqs.question: Do you accept new patients?
faqs.answer: Yes, we are always welcoming new patients! Please call us to schedule your first appointment.

faqs.question: Which insurance plans do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept a wide range of insurance plans. Please contact our front desk with your insurance details to confirm coverage.

faqs.question: How can I book an appointment?
faqs.answer: You can book an appointment by calling us at +1 (555) 123-4567 or by speaking to our AI receptionist.

faqs.question: What should I bring to my first appointment?
faqs.answer: Please bring your ID, insurance card, and a list of any medications you are currently taking.

faqs.question: Do you offer emergency services?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer emergency dental and medical care during our clinic hours. Please call us immediately if you have an emergency.

faqs.question: How can I cancel or reschedule an appointment?
faqs.answer: You can cancel or reschedule by calling us at least 24 hours in advance. Our AI receptionist can also assist you.

faqs.question: What is the cost of a dental cleaning?
faqs.answer: A standard dental check-up and cleaning typically ranges from $100 to $150, depending on individual needs.

faqs.question: Do you have pediatric dentists?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have dentists who specialize in pediatric care, ensuring a comfortable visit for your children.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept cash, major credit cards, and most insurance plans.
